case_title: POWELL, TONI vs. QUINN, RUBY AS ADMIN OF EST OF ALICE FAIRBANKS,DEC

docket_entries.description: DEPT.2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; D. PADILLA, CSR; V. T. INVENTADO, CLERK. 9:50 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLTFF FILES MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. COURT GRANTS MOTION; NO OBJECTION AS TO THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $4,140.40; RESERVED ISSUES COURT COSTS, ATTY'S FEES & INTEREST FOR ARGUMENT. CONSIDERING THE ARGUMENTS & EVIDENCE: (1) OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED; (2) COURT COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $113.00 ARE GRANTED; (3) 10% INTEREST FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT TIL DATE DEBT IS PAID IS GRANTED; (4) ATTY'S FEES ARE GRANTED TO PLTFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500.00 PER PROBATE CODE 9354. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINN, RUBY AS ADMIN OF EST OF ALICE FAIRBANKS,DEC $4,140.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,753.00, 10% INTEREST FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT TIL PRINCIPAL SUM IS PAID.
